title: 日本ダービーの後に・笑い泣きの栄冠

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I won? I won the Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow... The gods really came in clutch today.
Personally, woulda preferred their favor when I
was growin' up, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A victory here should have me bouncin' off the
walls with joy. The fam's gonna be over the
moon...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So, how come... How come I...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I won, y'know? I was all beat up, but I
went 'n won the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But instead of feelin' happy, I feel way more...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Relieved... I was shakin' like a leaf seein' all those
tough runners, but I still won.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's a big deal, right? Right? So then why do I feel so... pathetic?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Folks only get one shot to win the Derby 'n I
seized mine. I should be celebratin' like there's no
tomorrow. Hehe... Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross forces herself to laugh, but I can
see her legs trembling. The fear, adrenaline and
exhaustion have clearly gotten to her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Something tells me this isn't the time to chat. Talk
about a heavy atmosphere...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: In that case, I just say it from here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Tamamo. Your running today
was spectacular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even while hurting deeply on the inside, Tamamo
Cross accomplishes a tremendous feat. She will
forever be etched into history as a Derby
champion.
